snippet.title: WILD HORSE NINE | Official Trailer | Searchlight Pictures
snippet.description:
In theaters November 6, 2026. 

Shortly before the 1973 Chilean coup, CIA agents Chris (John Malkovich) and Lee (Sam Rockwell) are dispatched from Santiago to Easter island by their bureau chief, MJ (Steve Buscemi). Amongst the Island's iconic statues, and as the longtime partners wrestle with their dark pasts and present conspiracies, Chris's newfound bond with a pair of rebellious students (Mariana di Girolamo and Ailín Salas) threatens to send everyone’s trip to this remote paradise sideways.

Directed by: Martin McDonagh
Written by: Martin McDonagh
Produced by: Graham Broadbent, Pete Czernin, Martin McDonagh, Anita Overland
Cast: John Malkovich, Sam Rockwell, Steve Buscemi, Mariana di Girolamo, Ailín Salas, with Tom Waits, and Parker Posey

snippet.title: I Played 100 Hours Of Crimson Desert - A PERFECTLY BALANCED GAME WITH NO EXPLOITS #ad
snippet.description:
Crimson Desert is finally here and I was lucky enough to be one of the few creators given early access to the game to make a video! And so here we are we an amazing video sponsored from the developers at pearlabyss! link to the game: https://pearlabyss.info/CrimsonDesert_TheSpiffingBrit

So today I the spiffing brit want to see if this insanely huge game is a perfectly balanced adventure with no exploits or if I the spiffing brit can do my usual tactic of finding  overpowered game mechanics to exploit! Today I am showcasing the power of an infinite attack spear build and the explosive stun lock extravaganza of archery! With just two explosive arrows you too can keep anything stunned and transform an impossible task into a walk in the park!


So what is crimson desert well according to steam: Crimson Desert is an open-world action-adventure set on the continent of Pywel. Join Kliff on his journey to rebuild the Greymane faction and to save the land from a looming threat. From vast wilderness and cities to ruins and the mysterious Abyss, forge your path through battles and discovery.

I would largely agree with that assessment. Its got flavours of skyrim, the witcher 3, breath of the wild and dark souls. But at the same time it is doing its own thing. It has some similarity with black desert online but this is definitely a single player game. So yeah its an everything kind of game where you can just get lost and enjoy the huge open world adventure, discover crafting and cooking recipes, puzzles, hidden easter eggs, unique equipment and rare gems to socket into your gear.

snippet.title: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2: Showdown | Battle Pass Trailer
snippet.description:
Join Team Foundation or Team Ice King and lead your team to victory to unlock new weapons, items, and rewards during the Season. The winning team at the end of the Season decides the final reward: everyone with the Battle Pass unlocks either Frost-Ready Foundation or Exalted Frost Ice King. 

Get the Pass for 800 V-Bucks or with Fortnite Crew to instantly unlock Exalted Ice King. Pick up the Pass before March 26 at 11:59 PM ET and claim the launch week exclusive Stealth Tech Foundation bonus Style and accessories. 

Level up to earn premium rewards like the Ice Prince Sidekick, Ice King’s Frostwalkers Kicks, and Outfits like The Order (Reforged), Elite Jules, and Bugs Bunny.

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Tayc - JOŸA : La Naissance (Le Film)
snippet.description:
Tayc - JOŸA : La Naissance (Vidéo Officielle)
Super-Héros disponible 👉 https://bfan.link/superheros
S'abonner à la chaîne 👉 http://bit.ly/TaycYTB

JOŸA 15.05.2026 : http://Joya-univers.com
-------------------------------
Artiste : Tayc
Label : H24

Mot du réalisateur :

Je tiens, en tant que réalisateur, à remercier tout particulièrement Tayc pour sa confiance et pour m’avoir donné l’opportunité de réaliser ce film sur ses terres d’origine, au Cameroun.

Merci à Paola, Yvanella et toute l’équipe de Good Mood Publishing pour leur engagement et pour ce travail mené ensemble, main dans la main.

Je tiens également à remercier le directeur de la photographie Camille Jaulent pour son implication et son talent sur ce projet, sans qui je n’aurais pas pu mener ce film à son terme.

Merci aux Films de la Chapelle et à Pauline Sicard et à Corentin Ferrero pour son aide précieuse.
Merci à Francky Anefalo pour son implication dans le montage du film et du making-of.

Merci à Barack Adama et H24 pour leur confiance depuis le début, ainsi qu’à Aly Bamba.

Un immense merci au Cameroun pour son accueil, sa générosité et l’énergie qui ont accompagné ce tournage.

Four years after the events of Spider-Man: No Way Home, Peter Parker is no more and Spider-Man is at the top of his game keeping New York City safe. In order to take on what's ahead, Spider-Man not only needs to be at the top of his physical and mental game, but he must also be prepared to face the repercussions of his past!
